Title: Ashlesh
Age: CurrentAt least 10996 years old Timeline BornEarlier than 10000 BN Edit

children.title: Origins
children.textContent:
According to Kathkani mythology, there were ten ferocious demon siblings who today are known as the Ten, the first demonic entities. Fiddlesticks is the first of the Ten, existing since the first screams of creation.

Hungering for primal joy, Ashlesh, one of the Ten, attempted to consume the realm of the Gods—but the Gods struck the monster down, trapping it deep below the earth in an endless, shimmering lake within the seventh layer of the underworld. There it would be guarded by a mythical order of heroes.

mainContent.title: Appearance
mainContent.textContent: Ashlesh has been described as having seven arms and a shimmering pale blue body, not much else is known.

children.title: Aspects
children.textContent: Ashlesh once tried to consume the realm of the gods, which got him imprissoned in the seventh layer, guarded by a mystical order.

children.title: Nilah
children.textContent: Nilah made a deal with the Lord of Joy. In exchange for her former life, soul after death and every emotion except Joy; she now wields the power of Ashlesh, slaying legendary beasts in hope of being remembered as a hero.
